title: Sign in and reach a personalized dashboard
description: A returning user can sign in with valid credentials and land on a dashboard that shows personalized internship information.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify a personalized dashboard is displayed
Verify assigned course information is displayed

title: Create an account and arrive on the dashboard
description: A new registrant can create an account with a selected internship domain and reach the dashboard in the correct onboarding state.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill in the email field with a new valid email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Select an internship domain
Submit the account creation form
Verify a personalized dashboard is displayed
Verify the onboarding state reflects the selected domain

title: Block dashboard access for unauthenticated users
description: An unauthenticated visitor cannot view protected dashboard progress data when opening the dashboard route directly.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify protected-route behavior is shown
Verify user progress data is not displayed

title: Show the landing sign-in experience
description: A visitor opening the portal landing page sees the sign-in experience with the expected blue themed branding.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the sign-in experience is displayed
Verify the blue-themed branding is visible

title: Load personalized project cards on the dashboard
description: An authenticated user can open the dashboard and see assigned project cards together with personalized greeting and course information.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify a personalized greeting is displayed
Verify assigned project cards are displayed
Verify assigned course information is displayed

title: Select and track active projects on the dashboard
description: An authenticated user can select active projects and see completion status update across the selected project cards.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Select an active project
Select another active project
Select up to four active projects
Verify the selected projects are marked as active
Verify completion status is displayed for the active projects

title: Show XP and badge progress on the dashboard
description: An authenticated user can review XP and badge progress alongside project information on the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify XP progress is displayed
Verify badge progress is displayed

title: Reject invalid sign-in details with clear feedback
description: A user who enters invalid credentials sees validation feedback and stays on the sign-in experience without breaking the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with an invalid email address
Fill in the password field with an invalid password
Submit the sign-in form
Verify validation feedback is visible
Verify the blue-themed sign-in interface remains visible

title: Keep the authentication pages visually consistent
description: The landing, login, and registration pages all present a stable blue-themed interface for a consistent entry experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the blue-themed interface is visible
Navigate to /login
Verify the blue-themed interface is visible
Navigate to /register
Verify the blue-themed interface is visible

title: Render the dashboard safely when user data is incomplete
description: The dashboard remains usable and does not break when some personalized user or project data is missing.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the dashboard remains visible
Verify a fallback state is displayed for missing data
